title: First Minister looks for meeting over US military use of Prestwick Airport

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: First Minister looks for meeting over US military use of Prestwick Airport. First Minister John Swinney is looking for a meeting with the UK Government over the use of Prestwick Airport by the US military.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – First Minister looks for meeting over US military use of Prestwick Airport
